title: Lankesterella spannageliana
intro: Lankesterella spannageliana is a rare and endemic species of orchid found in Mexico, belonging to the family Orchidaceae. The plant is known for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections and other conditions. The bioactive constituents of Lankesterella spannageliana include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often employed in folk medicine to treat respiratory issues and other health concerns.
taxonomy: Lankesterella spannageliana is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Lankesterella spannageliana further falls under the subfamily Vanilleae and tribe Vanilleae. The genus Lankesterella is a part of the orchid tribe Vanilleae. Lankesterella spannageliana is native to Costa Rica.
